name: Lever
description: Lever is a modern recruiting and applicant tracking platform. The API lets you manage job postings, candidates (called opportunities), interviews, and hiring pipeline stages programmatically. It is commonly used to build ATS integrations and automate recruiting workflows.

capabilities.name: list_opportunities
capabilities.description: Retrieve all candidate opportunities (applications) in your Lever account with filtering by stage, source, and date.

capabilities.name: create_opportunity
capabilities.description: Add a new candidate opportunity to Lever. Assigns them to a posting and sets initial pipeline stage.

capabilities.name: list_postings
capabilities.description: Retrieve all job postings, filterable by team, location, and published status.

capabilities.name: create_posting
capabilities.description: Create a new job posting with title, description, team, location, and commitment (full-time, part-time, etc.).

capabilities.name: add_candidate_note
capabilities.description: Add a note to a candidate's opportunity record. Useful for logging interview feedback or recruiter observations.

capabilities.name: advance_opportunity
capabilities.description: Move a candidate opportunity to the next stage in the hiring pipeline.

capabilities.name: list_interviews
capabilities.description: Retrieve all scheduled interviews for a given opportunity, including panelists and time slots.
